Class BasicQuery

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.couchbase.core.query.Query
org.springframework.data.couchbase.repository.support.BasicQuery
public class BasicQuery extends Query
BasicQuery for Querydsl
Author:
Michael Reiche, Tigran Babloyan

  • Constructor Details

    • BasicQuery

      public BasicQuery(Query query, Map<String,String> projectionFields)
      Create a new BasicQuery given a query CouchbaseDocument and field specification CouchbaseDocument.
      Parameters:
      query - must not be null.
      projectionFields - can be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when sortObject or fieldsObject is null.

    • BasicQuery

      public BasicQuery(QueryCriteriaDefinition criteria, Map<String,String> projectionFields)

  • Method Details

    • setSort

      public void setSort(Sort sort)
      Set the sort CouchbaseDocument.
      Parameters:
      sort - must not be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when sortObject is null.

      public void setProjectionFields(Map<String,String> projectionFields)
      Set the fields (projection) CouchbaseDocument.
      Parameters:
      projectionFields - must not be null.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - when fieldsObject is null.
